announcement.goals.undercover: You don't have a Mood, and Killers will mistake you for their ally.
announcement.goals.conductor: Use the master key to open up every door on the train!
announcement.role.the_insane_damned_para: The Insane Damned Paranoid Killer Of Doom Death Destruction And Waffles
announcement.goals.bartender: See players that drink through walls!
announcement.goals.phantom: Turn invisible; but watch out for collisions.
announcement.goals.noisemaker: Alert players of your location upon death.
noellesroles.noisemaker.broadcast_start: §aYou raise your voice! Everyone can hear you now!
announcement.goals.voodoo: Choose another player to go down with you.
hud.voodoo.natural_death_disabled: Voodoo deaths must be triggered by another player!
announcement.goals.vulture: Eat half of the players' bodies to win!
announcement.goals.recaller: Teleport to anywhere on the train!
announcement.goals.time_keeper: You can see how much time is left of the round.
announcement.goals.toxicologist: You can see who is poisoned.
announcement.goals.professor: Use Iron Man Vials to protect other players!
announcement.goals.jester: Get killed by an innocent to win!
game.win.jester: Did you hear that? The sound of laughter mocking your foolish justice.
announcement.goals.corrupt_cop: Kill everyone to win! While you're alive, neither killers nor passengers can win.
game.win.corrupt_cop: Justice has been served... my way.
announcement.goals.pathogen: Infect all surviving players to win!
game.win.pathogen: The infection has spread to every corner...
announcement.goals.bomber: Plant bombs on players! You cannot buy knife or gun. You can see players carrying your timed bomb through walls.
announcement.goals.assassin: Use your keen eye to expose players' true identities! Right guess—BANG! Wrong guess—also BANG! (Vigilante's too smart to fool)
announcement.goals.scavenger: Cover your tracks! Bodies you create are invisible to most. Bonus: Extra cash per kill, knife-only arsenal, and a 100-coin CD reset option.
announcement.goals.reporter: Mark a player to see them through walls!
announcement.goals.serial_killer: Hunt and kill your target! Target automatically changes on death. Extra money for kills on your target!
announcement.goals.attendant: Check your passenger manifest to see who's in each room!
announcement.goals.taotie: Swallow all players or survive 2 minutes during Taotie Moment to win!
game.win.taotie: The endless hunger has finally been satisfied.
announcement.goals.silencer: Shut them up! Silenced targets can't speak, hear others, eat food, drink cocktails, and their SAN drains faster.
announcement.goals.bodyguard: Protect the Serial Killer's target! Stay within 3 blocks to sacrifice yourself and save them.
announcement.goals.poisoner: Use poison needles and gas bombs to poison your enemies! You can also use poison vials and scorpions.
announcement.goals.bandit: Use throwing axes to kill from range! Hold longer for further throws, penetrates through players!
announcement.goals.survival_master: You are invisible to killer instinct! When conditions are met, Survival Moment activates — survive 120 seconds to win!
item.noellesroles.defense_vial.tooltip:
Right click on drink trays to use
Clears all poison applied to trays
Protects anyone who drinks a defensed drink one extra hit of life.
item.noellesroles.fine_drink.tooltip:
Restores full Mood when consumed
Can be placed on platters for others
item.noellesroles.iron_man_vial.tooltip:
Use on a player within 3 blocks
Grants the target an armor buff
Blocks one lethal hit
item.noellesroles.timed_bomb.tooltip:
Right click on a player to plant
After 10s, bomb starts beeping
Can be passed to other players (3s cooldown)
Explodes after 15s of beeping
item.noellesroles.scavenger_reset_knife_:
Costs 150 coins
Instantly resets your knife cooldown
item.noellesroles.corrupt_cop_crowbar.to:
Corrupt Cop Moment exclusive
Can open all doors
item.noellesroles.timekeeper_reduce_time:
Costs 100 coins
Reduces game time by 45 seconds
item.noellesroles.antidote.tooltip:
Use on a poisoned player to cure them
Requires 1.5s charge time
Use on poisoned plates to remove poison
3 minute cooldown after use
item.noellesroles.poison_needle.tooltip:
Right-click a player to inject poison
1 minute initial cooldown, 45s cooldown after use
Reusable
item.noellesroles.poison_gas_bomb.toolti:
Right-click to throw a gas bomb
Releases gas that spreads through open spaces
Gas cannot pass through blocks
Staying in gas for 5s causes poisoning
Gas dissipates after 30s
item.noellesroles.catalyst.tooltip:
Use on a poisoned player: death in 5s
Also resets Poison Needle cooldown
Using on air or non-poisoned only resets cooldown
item.noellesroles.throwing_axe.tooltip:
Hold right-click to charge, release to throw
Longer charge = further distance
Penetrates through multiple players, instant kill
item.noellesroles.ingredient.tooltip: Right-click on a base spirit to mix in
item.noellesroles.rum.effect: Speed II for 7s, restores an extra 20% sanity
item.noellesroles.gin.effect: Night Vision for 10s, immunity to Lights Out, instantly removes Blindness, restores an extra 20% sanity
item.noellesroles.vodka.effect: Stimulation for 15s: infinite stamina + cooldown speed +20%, instantly reduces all cooldowns by 20%, restores an extra 20% sanity. After: stamina depleted + exhaustion + Slowness II for 3s
item.noellesroles.tequila.effect: No Collision for 7s (pass through other players), restores an extra 20% sanity
item.noellesroles.whiskey.effect: Shield for 20s (each layer blocks one lethal hit or swallow, stackable), restores an extra 20% sanity
item.noellesroles.ice_cube.effect: Removes the base spirit's debuff and makes modifiers take effect immediately
death_reason.noellesroles.bodyguard_sacr: sacrificed themselves to protect their target.
tip.bomber.bomb_warning: You have a bomb on you! It will explode in %s seconds! Pass it to someone else!
tip.item.invisible_in_hand: This item is hidden from other players
tip.scavenger.not_enough_money: Need 150 coins to reset knife CD!
tip.corrupt_cop.moment_triggered: Corrupt Cop Moment activated! Gun cooldown reduced, crowbar obtained!
tip.silencer.ready: Ability ready! Aim at target and press [%s] to mark
tip.silencer.marked: Marked %s, press again within 30s to silence
tip.silenced.cannot_eat: You are silenced and cannot eat!
tip.silenced.cannot_drink: You are silenced and cannot drink!
tip.survival_master.moment_active: Survival Moment! Hold on! %s seconds remaining
tip.assassin.guess_correct: Bingo! You saw right through %s—they're down!
tip.assassin.guess_wrong: Oops! %s isn't what you thought... BANG! Overconfidence has its price.
tip.pathogen.no_target: No targets within your vision range
tip.letter.pathogen.tooltip2: P.S.; Every time you are §ainfected§r, other passengers will notice!
tip.letter.taotie.tooltip2: P.S.: After digesting a passenger, some items will §4drop§r out. You will also release all passengers you've swallowed when you §4die§r!
tip.letter.jester.tooltip2: P.S.: After turning into a §dMadman§r, hunt down the target who shot you!
tip.letter.vulture.tooltip2: P.S.: Eating §2corpses§r creates particle effects. Don't let other passengers catch you!
tip.letter.survival_master.tooltip2: P.S.: Strive to survive until the §3end§r.
tip.letter.toxicologist.tooltip2: P.S.: While observing others §2getting poisoned§r, also pay attention to your own heartbeat.
tip.letter.professor.tooltip2: P.S.: Your potion lasts 3 minutes initially, then 5 minutes. Each person can only have one shield at a time (cannot shield yourself).
tip.letter.undercover.tooltip2: P.S.: Eliminate all fellow killers, and don't let your acting slip!
tip.letter.coroner.tooltip2: P.S.: Remember to carefully examine the information on corpses.
tip.letter.noisemaker.tooltip2: P.S.: The notification of your death will not be seen by Neutrals and Killers.
tip.letter.time_keeper.tooltip2: P.S.: For each Innocent that dies, the game time §cincreases by 30 seconds§r.
tip.letter.voodoo.tooltip2: P.S.: Target suspicious passengers. Be careful not to curse the innocents!
tip.letter.bartender.tooltip2: P.S.: Passengers who have drunk alcohol are highlighted in your vision. Fine wine will fully restore your mood.
tip.letter.conductor.tooltip2: Dear §6Conductor§r, please carry your §6Master Key§r carefully. It will §4drop§r upon your death.
tip.letter.bodyguard.tooltip2: P.S.: You can see your protection target through walls. When you are present, the §4Serial Killer§r is also in the game!
tip.letter.reporter.tooltip2: P.S.: Mark those you find most suspicious or worthy of attention.
tip.letter.attendant.tooltip2: Dear Attendant, don't forget to check the rooms using your Passenger Manifest.
tip.letter.recaller.tooltip2: P.S.: You can spend 100 Gold to teleport back to your previously marked recall point.
tip.letter.bomber.tooltip2: P.S.: Bombs won't ignite spontaneously in your hand. Move away from others when passing them!
tip.letter.swapper.tooltip2: P.S.: You can swap places every 60 seconds. Don't fall off the train!
tip.letter.assassin.tooltip2: P.S.: Don't reveal your identity. Eliminate key targets when necessary.
tip.letter.bandit.tooltip2: P.S.: Your pistol costs half the price compared to other killers. You can also throw a tomahawk to hit passengers through walls.
tip.letter.poisoner.tooltip2: P.S.: Don't forget to use your §2Catalyst§r to make them succumb to the poison.
tip.letter.silencer.tooltip2: P.S.: Use on the nearest player. Silenced targets cannot eat or drink.
tip.letter.phantom.tooltip2: P.S.: While sprinting, your particle effects will be §4visible§r to other players.
tip.letter.morphling.tooltip2: P.S.: Your movement speed decreases when disguised as a corpse, but other actions are unaffected.
tip.letter.serial_killer.tooltip2: P.S.: Kill your target! When you are present, the Bodyguard will also be in the game.
tip.letter.scavenger.tooltip2: P.S.: The Big Mouth's silence on your kills is §4ineffective§r. Vultures can see the corpses of passengers you've killed.
tip.letter.corrupt_cop.tooltip2: P.S.: Your gun's §7cooldown§r is shorter when killing others. Eliminate all surviving passengers!
tip.noellesroles.taotie_moment_countdown: Find and kill Taotie! Time remaining: %s seconds
tip.noellesroles.survival_moment_countdo: Find and kill the Survival Master! Time remaining: %s seconds
screen.assassin.title: Assassin Menu
subtitle.noellesroles.corrupt_cop_moment: The Corrupt Cop has cleared enough people. He initiates the final gambit against the survivors.
subtitle.noellesroles.taotie_moment: The endless hunger will devour everything
subtitle.noellesroles.jester_moment: When justice begins to mock itself...
subtitle.noellesroles.survival_moment: The Survival Master has vanished into the shadows. Killers must find them before time runs out.
replay.skill.noellesroles.noisemaker: %s §eroared at the top of their lungs§r, heard by everyone
replay.skill.noellesroles.criminal_reaso: %s tried to §6reason§r that %s was killed by %s, but failed
replay.death_blocked.survival_moment: %s was immune to assassination during §dSurvival Moment§r
replay.death_blocked.corrupt_cop_moment: %s was immune to death during §dCorrupt Cop Moment§r
replay.death_blocked.taotie_moment: %s was immune to death during §dTaotie Moment§r
%s placed a §dFine Drink§r on a platter
replay.platter_take.noellesroles.fine_dr: %s took a §dFine Drink§r from a platter
replay.poisoned.noellesroles.needle.by: %s was poisoned by %s with a §5poison needle§r
announcement.goals.criminal_reasoner: Find out the killer of each victim.
game.win.criminal_reasoner: Every grudge of the dead has been settled.
tip.criminal_reasoner.guess_wrong: This seems to be incorrect reasoning.
hud.criminal_reasoner.press_key_hint: Press [%s] to open the criminal reasoning menu
screen.criminal_reasoner.title: Criminal Reasoning Menu
screen.criminal_reasoner.subtitle.select: Choose the dead player you want to reason about first
Then pick the living player you suspect is the killer
screen.criminal_reasoner.empty_victims: There are no dead players to reason about yet
announcement.goals.engineer: You can sense pried/locked doors! Use your Repair Tool to fix or lock/unlock doors!
announcement.goals.riot_patrol: You are on the passenger side. Right-click to raise the riot shield and block melee attacks from the front, but your view locks and you slow down heavily; left-click with it to shove nearby players back. The riot fork roots both you and a target within 3 blocks for 8 seconds.
announcement.goals.hunter: You are on the killer side. Kill all innocents; if no neutral role completes its objective, killers win. Bear traps disable movement input for 3 seconds and apply Fracture. Fracture blocks sprinting and stamina recovery, but the first stack does not slow movement; each additional stack after the first reduces speed by 20%, and each stack heals after 60 seconds. Use a Poison Vial on a placed trap to coat it; when it triggers, the poisoning killer gains 75 coins and the Hunter gains 50 coins. Innocent-side trap vision is limited to Vigilante, Veteran, Riot Patrol, Corrupt Cop, and Engineer. Only Veteran, Riot Patrol, Corrupt Cop, and Engineer can dismantle traps.
item.noellesroles.repair_tool.tooltip:
Use on pried door: Repair
Use on closed door: Lock
Use on locked door: Unlock
Cooldown: 3 minutes
item.noellesroles.riot_shield.tooltip:
Right-click to raise the shield: block all frontal lethal attacks, lock your view, and slow down heavily
Left-click to shove nearby players back
Left-click cooldown: 3 seconds
Right-click cooldown after lowering: 30 seconds
item.noellesroles.riot_fork.tooltip:
Use on a player within 3 blocks
Both of you are rooted for 8 seconds
Cooldown: 1 minute
item.noellesroles.hunter_trap.tooltip.li: - Place a bear trap at your feet.
- Victims lose movement input for 3 seconds.
- Applies 1 Fracture stack: no sprint, no stamina recovery, first stack has no slow, each extra stack slows by 20%, 60s heal time per stack.
- Use a Poison Vial on a placed trap to coat it.

- Poisoned triggers give 75 coins to the poisoner and 50 to the Hunter. Visible to killers, Vigilante, Veteran, Riot Patrol, Corrupt Cop, and Engineer; only Veteran, Riot Patrol, Corrupt Cop, and Engineer can dismantle it.
- To reload, open your inventory, hold a shell, and right-click the shotgun.
- Straight shot with an effective range of 8 blocks.
- After the first shell is loaded, you have 10 seconds to load the second shell. If the window expires, you must fire before reloading again.
- If the chamber becomes empty after firing, the shotgun enters a 30 second cooldown. Does not drop on death or after killing an innocent.
item.noellesroles.double_barrel_shell.to:
Used to load the double-barrel shotgun
Purchased separately in the shop
tip.engineer.door_blasted: A door has been pried open!
roleinfo.screen.title: Role Info
roleinfo.win_condition.ferryman: Escort the souls of half the total player count to win.
replay.death_blocked.riot_shield: %s blocked a frontal attack with a §briot shield§r
replay.death_blocked.ferryman_reaction: %s nullified a fatal blow with §bferryman's reaction§r
tip.noellesroles.riot_fork.rooted: You have been pinned by a riot fork!
replay.global.noellesroles.hunter_trap_t: %s's §bpoisoned bear trap§r trapped %s after being coated by %s
%s was trapped by a §bpoisoned bear trap§r
announcement.goals.orthopedist: You are on the passenger side. Use Ancient Bone Setting on a fractured player to heal 1 Fracture stack. Using it on a normal player grants Bone Setting: 20 seconds of 25% reduced stamina consumption and 5 seconds of Speed I. Cooldown: 1 minute. Your passive Agile Steps permanently reduces your own stamina consumption by 20%.
announcement.goals.ferryman: Escort the souls of half the lobby's corpses. After being struck, you gain a brief reaction window to negate that fatal attack. Each escorted corpse grants 1 blessing; a successful empowered reaction consumes 1 blessing to stun the attacker for 6 seconds and grant you Speed II for 6 seconds.
game.win.ferryman: May every soul stranded far from home one day return to where it belongs.
tip.orthopedist.heal: Press %s to heal 1 Fracture stack from %s
tip.orthopedist.buff: Press %s to use Bone Setting on %s
tip.orthopedist.no_target: Aim at a player within 3 blocks
tip.ferryman.reaction_ready: Press %s to nullify the fatal hit
tip.ferryman.attacker_warn: Do not disturb the rest of the dead.
item.noellesroles.liqueur.effect: Doubles the duration of all drink effects, including base spirit debuffs and Vodka drawbacks
item.noellesroles.special_spice.effect: Makes the drink restore 60% sanity instead of the normal amount
announcement.goals.commander: You are part of the killer faction. Other killers know your player name at the start and can identify you by a special color in instinct vision. You can open a menu to mark up to two Threat Targets. If another killer eliminates them, every killer-faction player gains 50 coins. If every other killer dies, you immediately shoot yourself.
tip.commander.target_marked: %s has been marked as a Threat Target
tip.commander.reward: Threat Target %s was eliminated. Killer faction gained 50 coins
tip.commander.ready: Press [%s] to open the threat menu. Marks left: %s
tip.commander.no_marks: No threat marks remain this round
screen.commander.title: Commander Menu
screen.commander.empty: There are no valid targets to mark
roleinfo.skill.commander.killer_id.effec: All other killers know your player name at round start and can identify you by a special instinct color. When you die, all killer-faction players are notified.
roleinfo.skill.commander.killer_id.name: Command Presence
roleinfo.skill.commander.threat_mark.eff: Press your ability key to open a target menu and mark one player as a Threat Target. 30 second cooldown, two total marks per round. If another killer kills them, all killer-faction players gain 50 coins.
roleinfo.skill.commander.last_bullet.eff: If all other killers die, you die immediately. Your personal kill reward is 75 coins, and you cannot buy lockpick, psycho mode, crowbar, or knife.
roleinfo.skill.commander.shop.effect: Revolver costs 150, blackout costs 300, grenade costs 400. You cannot buy lockpick, psycho mode, crowbar, or knife.
roleinfo.skill.commander.shop.name: Command Arsenal
announcement.goals.saint: You are on the passenger side. You have no sanity, cannot pick up guns, and are immune to voodoo magic. If you are killed, your killer is permanently burdened with Karma until the round ends: after every later kill or item use, they cannot kill or use items again for 5 seconds. If the killer is the Bomber, that lock lasts 20 seconds. Innocent-side attacks cannot kill you.
tip.saint.karmic_debt: You are permanently burdened with Karma until the round ends.
tip.saint.karma_triggered: Karma backlash: you cannot kill or use items for %s seconds
tip.saint.voodoo_immune: Saint is immune to voodoo magic
roleinfo.skill.saint.hellfire.name: Hellfire
roleinfo.skill.saint.hellfire.effect: When you are killed, the killer is permanently burdened with Karma until the round ends. After every later successful kill or item use, they cannot kill or use items again for 5 seconds. If that killer is the Bomber, the lock lasts 20 seconds instead. A timer is shown while the backlash is active.
roleinfo.skill.saint.divine_focus.name: Divine Focus
roleinfo.skill.saint.divine_focus.effect: You have no sanity, cannot pick up guns, and are immune to voodoo magic. If an innocent-side player tries to kill you, that kill is canceled.
